zh.Inverugie, Aberdeenshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Laurence Grant 2nd of Stratherrick於大約1230年出生在英國蘇格蘭音巴內-爾時，他的父親Gregory - Le Grant Grant 1st of Stratherrick32歲，母親Maria Bisset31歲。他和Marjorie Comyn Countess of Dunbar至少有1個兒子。他於1258年被列為sheriff of inverness (who “rendered accounts to the scottish exchequer")。他去世於大約1275年在英國蘇格蘭享年47歲。

nameMeanings.name: Grant
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish, English, and especially Scottish (of Norman origin): nickname from Anglo-Norman French graund, graunt ‘tall, large’ (Old French grand, grant, from Latin grandis), given either to a person of remarkable size, or else in a relative way to distinguish two bearers of the same personal name, often representatives of different generations within the same family.
English: from the rare Middle English (and Old English) personal name Grante or Grente.
Irish: in Ireland this is usually the Norman Scottish name (see 1 above), but it was also adopted for Irish Mag Raighne, see Graney .

variants.name: Graney
meanings: Irish (Galway, Cork, and Kerry): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Raighne ‘son of Raighne’, a pet form of Raghnall. It has sometimes been changed to Grant . See also Rainey .
Possibly an altered form of Swiss German Gräni, unexplained.

variants.name: Grand
meanings: French: nickname from Old French grand, grant ‘tall, large’, from Latin grandis. See also Grant 1 and 4, compare Degrand and Legrand .
German: topographic name for someone who lived in a gravelly area, from Middle Low German grand ‘coarse gravel’.
German: nickname from a southern word of uncertain origin meaning ‘frustration, anger, ire’.

variants.name: Grande
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Rocco, Domenic, Mario, Antonio, Santo, Orlando, Americo, Carmine, Gennaro, Luigi, Pasquale, Saverio, Alberico.  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Alicia, Ricardo, Jorge, Juan, Raul, Angel, Atilio.
Italian, Spanish, and Portuguese: nickname for someone of large stature, in either a literal or figurative sense, from grande ‘tall, large’.
German: habitational name from Grande in Holstein or Grand in Bavaria.

variants.name: General
meanings: African American: from the English vocabulary word general, possibly adopted as a surname in honor of a certain general of the US army, most probably Ulysses S. Grant (see Grant , compare President ). Compare also 3 below.
German: nickname for a mercenary (employed in royal services).
Hispanic (mainly Philippines): nickname from Spanish general ‘general’ (military officer).

nameMeanings.name: Laurence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a French form of Latin Laurentius ‘man from Laurentum’. Laurentum was a town in Latium, which may have got its name from Latin laurus ‘laurel’, although it is more probably of pre-Roman origin. The given name was moderately popular in the Middle Ages (when it was used for girls as well as boys), under the influence of a 3rd-century saint who was one of the seven deacons of Rome. He was martyred in 258 . The legend is that, having been required to hand over the Church's treasures to the civil authorities, he assembled the poor and sick and presented them. For this act of Christian defiance, he was roasted to death on a gridiron. In England the name is also associated with St Laurence of Canterbury ( d. 619 ). A more recent influence has been the actor Sir Laurence Olivier ( 1907–89 ). See also Lawrence .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Laurence Grant 2nd of Stratherrick was born about 1230, in Inverness-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Gregory - Le Grant Grant 1st of Stratherrick, was 32 and his mother, Maria Bisset, was 31. He had at least 1 son with Marjorie Comyn Countess of Dunbar. In 1258, his occupation is listed as sheriff of inverness (who “rendered accounts to the scottish exchequer"). He died about 1275, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 47.

Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Marjorie Comyn Countess of Dunbar. En 1258, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of inverness (who “rendered accounts to the scottish exchequer"). Il est décédé environ 1275, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.Cromdale and Inverallan and Advie, Inver: Cromdale and Inverallan and Advie, Inverness-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Laurence Grant 2nd of Stratherrick um 1230 in Inverness-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gregory - Le Grant Grant 1st of Stratherrick 32 und seine Mutter Maria Bisset 31. Er hatte mit Marjorie Comyn Countess of Dunbar mindestens 1 Sohn. 1258 ist sein Beruf als sheriff of inverness (who “rendered accounts to the scottish exchequer") aufgeführt. Er starb um 1275 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Laurence Grant 2nd of Stratherrick(이)가 대략 1230년 영국 스코틀랜드 인버네스-실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gregory - Le Grant Grant 1st of Stratherrick(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria Bisset(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Marjorie Comyn Countess of Dunbar(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1258년, 그의 직업은 sheriff of inverness (who “rendered accounts to the scottish exchequer")이었다. 그는 대략 1275년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Laurence Grant 2nd of Stratherrick nasceu aproximadamente 1230, em Inverness-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gregory - Le Grant Grant 1st of Stratherrick, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Maria Bisset, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Marjorie Comyn Countess of Dunbar. Em 1258, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of inverness (who “rendered accounts to the scottish exchequer"). ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Laurence Grant 2nd of Stratherrick родился около 1230 г. в местности инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gregory - Le Grant Grant 1st of Stratherrick было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Maria Bisset, 31. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Marjorie Comyn Countess of Dunbar. В 1258 году он работал по профессии sheriff of inverness (who “rendered accounts to the scottish exchequer"). Он умер около 1275 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет.
